sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: still easy to overrate as a health food because a protein bar is often a useful compromise, not a clean win. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Protein Bar (Generic) does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
